title: Orimon
description: a Mod that adds several Cobblemon item recipes to Oritech Machines
body:
This Mod adds several recipes to Oritech Machines including;

Pokeballs and Potions (current build, not all balls implemented)

XP Candy (Future Update)
Vitamins (Future Update)
Some Battle Items (Future Update)

THIS REQUIRES [Cobblemon: Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) and [Oritech](https://modrinth.com/mod/oritech/versions) TO RUN
